title: Senior Software Engineer in AI - Java Spring, Backend
company_focus: Cloud contact center software with AI-powered capabilities
description:
Join us in bringing joy to customer experience.  Five9 is a
leading provider of cloud contact center software, bringing
the power of cloud innovation to customers worldwide.

Living our values everyday results in our team-first culture
and enables us to innovate, grow, and thrive while enjoying
the journey together. We celebrate diversity and foster an
inclusive environment, empowering our employees to be their
authentic selves.

Senior Software Engineer in AI - Java Spring, backend

Five9 is a leading provider of cloud software for the
enterprise contact center market, bringing the power of the
cloud to thousands of customers and facilitating more than
three billion customer interactions annually. Five9 has led
the cloud revolution in contact centers, helping
organizations transition from legacy premise-based solutions
to the cloud. The cloud contact center market has become the
hot space for innovation in real-time communications and is
the tip of the spear for the application of Artificial
Intelligence. Five9 has led the charge with its Genius AI
platform. Five9 offers a high-energy environment with lots
of room for personal and professional growth. Our innovative
AI team is seeking a talented and experienced Senior Full
Stack Software Engineer. In this role, you will be part of
the team that builds software that brings AI technologies to
users. Prior AI experience is not required - you will have
the opportunity to integrate with AI technologies from
vendors like Azure, OpenAI, Google, Databricks, IBM, and
Amazon, and thus receive on-the-job experience for some of
the hottest skills on the market. An ideal candidate for us
is an experienced engineer who is passionate about building
high performance web platforms and applications, a brilliant
problem solver and a creative self-starter.

Key Responsibilities:

- Be part of an agile team developing a scalable, highly
  available application platform using modern PaaS platforms
  such as GCP.
- Utilizing Java Spring Framework, Spring Boot and reactive
  programming pattern for creation of highly scalable,
  robust microservices.
- Participate and contribute to requirements analysis and
  feature grooming.
- Understand how to leverage PaaS components, such as message
  buses, cloud functions (lambdas), and noSQL databases when
  developing software in order to achieve scalability,
  reliability, and operability.
- End-to-end feature development from UI implementation all
  the way through the middleware and backend platform.
- Document and communicate clearly architecture and
  implementation solutions.
- Have ownership of your code in production, including on-
  call, troubleshooting.

Key Skills:

- 5+ years software development experience.
- Highly proficient in Java – Spring Framework, Spring Boot,
  reactive programming (desirably, but not required to have
  experience with rxjava or similar) and JavaScript.
- Experience with PaaS hosted relational and no-SQL databases
  (mySQL, BigQuery, DataStore, etc)
- Familiarity with vibe coding using different AI tools like
  Claud Code,
- Experience in developing automated test cases with modern
  tools such as Junit.
- Experience in operational code ownership – on-call,
  troubleshooting, uptime.
- Experience in applying design patterns and separating
  concerns in a distributed system.
- Experience with Web Technologies (HTML, CSS, DOM,
  JavaScript) and web standards (HTML5)
- Familiarity with client-side JavaScript Toolkits such as
  React is a plus but not required.
- Must have experience working within an Agile/Scrum team.
- Positive, self-motivated and enthusiastic attitude with a
  strong sense of ownership.
- Strong proactive communication skills, both verbal and
  written.
- Design and manage data pipelines to process AI-generated
  insights, ensuring reliable data flow, quality, and
  actionable outputs for decision-making.
- AI skills in speech recognition and natural language
  processing are a plus but not required.
- Experience in contact center software is a plus but not
  required.

Five9 embraces diversity and is committed to building a team
that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and
skills.  The more inclusive we are, the better we are. 
Five9 is an equal opportunity employer.

View our privacy policy, including our privacy notice to
California residents here: https://www.five9.com/pt-
pt/legal.

Note: Five9 will never request that an applicant send money
as a prerequisite for commencing employment with Five9.
responsibilities: Develop scalable, highly available application platform on PaaS platforms such as GCP as part of an agile team
Build robust microservices using Java Spring Framework, Spring Boot, and reactive programming patterns
Leverage PaaS components including message buses, cloud functions, and NoSQL databases to achieve scalability and reliability
Own end-to-end feature development from UI through middleware and backend platform
Design and manage data pipelines to process AI-generated insights ensuring reliable data flow and quality
Document and communicate architecture and implementation solutions clearly
Take ownership of production code including on-call support and troubleshooting
Participate in requirements analysis and feature grooming
use_cases: Cloud contact center AI-powered customer interactions
Integration of vendor AI services (Azure, OpenAI, Google, Databricks, IBM, Amazon) into contact center platform
AI-generated insights processing and decision support via data pipelines
Speech recognition and natural language processing for contact center interactions
Real-time communications innovation powered by the Genius AI platform
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a backend software engineering role at an AI company
where the engineer builds the platform and infrastructure to
support AI technologies, but does NOT directly build, train,
fine-tune, or deploy AI models. The job explicitly states
"Prior AI experience is not required" and involves
integrating third-party AI vendor APIs (Azure, OpenAI,
Google, etc.) into a scalable backend platform. The core
work is Java Spring microservices development that enables
AI features for the contact center product.
